details.note: 6 lane-owners launched simultaneously for Phase 0 tool framework upgrade. Contention map: clean — no write-write conflicts on any shared file. Lane 0c (registry) reads from Lane 0b (cache) but designed for dual interface compatibility. Lane 0f (verification) is read-only.

Lane 0e completed. Proactively monitoring for registry.ts conflict: Lane 0e added 4 tool registrations to registry.ts. Lane 0c will modify registry.ts for cache config wiring. These touch different sections — should be additive.
